Localization.Description: Remote code execution using Impacket PsExec is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Remote code execution on host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {dst.host} using Impacket PsExec is detected
Remote code execution on host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.name} from host {dst.host} using Impacket PsExec is detected
